players.name: Janiah Barker
players.injury_comment: It's unknown when Barker will be cleared to suit up after missing the last three games due to a leg injury. However, even when the rookie is healthy enough to return, that doesn't mean she will see action, considering she has yet to make her WNBA debut.

players.name: Chennedy Carter
players.injury_comment: Carter will miss a fourth consecutive contest due to an illness, and her next chance to suit up will come Thursday against Dallas. In the meantime, Kierstan Bell and Brianna Turner could see increased playing time off the bench.

players.name: Dana Evans
players.injury_comment: Evans remains without a clear timetable for a return and has yet to make her season debut due to a left leg injury. She can be considered week-to-week until the Aces offer an update on her progress.
